title: Vrtl Bet (10/20/25 — empty placeholder)
html:
TL;DR

  • Empty Google Doc dated 10/20/25 — title only, zero body.
  • Confirms Vrtl Bet was on Yahir's mind in late October 2025 as a planning placeholder.
  • Datapoint for the vrtlpirates.com umbrella — the stealth-apps cluster picked up a "bet"-themed sibling around the time Swipr and Brotein were active.

Notes

Zero content. Doc was created and never written into. Preserved as a stamp in the Vrtl Bet entity's chronology.

Connections
